name: Tsubakimoto Chain Co.
summary: Tsubakimoto Chain Co. manufactures and sells materials handling systems, automotive parts, chains, and power transmission units and components. The company operates through four segments: Chain Operations, Power Transmission Units and Components Operations, Automotive Parts Operations, and Materials Handling Systems Operations. Its power transmission products include drive, conveyor, and top chains; and hose and cable carrier systems, reducers/variable speed drives, linear actuators, sprockets, timing belts and pulleys, locking devices, shaft couplings, and clutches. The company's automotive parts comprise timing chains, Enedrive chains, power drive chains, and cam clutches.  Its materials handling systems include automatic sort systems for the distribution industry; storage equipment and systems for drug development, biotechnology, and nanotechnology fields; automatic material handling systems for newspaper printing factories; other equipment and systems; bulk handling systems; metalworking chips handling and coolant processing systems; and high-speed lifters. The company's products are used in machine tool, LCD, semiconductor, steel, food, automotive, distribution, and life science industries. It has operations in Japan, the Americas, Europe, China, South Korea, Asia and Oceania, and Taiwan. Tsubakimoto Chain Co. was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
